approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Add a read-only Morning Build Review summary and no-send Harlan digest preview to the proposed-card source proof readback.
constraints: Do not send Harlan, Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, public messages, model calls, extraction runs, connector probes, browser sessions, or external writes.
Do not create backlog cards, approval records, Scoper records, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, route records, or destination records.
Do not auto-promote proposed-card recommendations into backlog, sprint, route action, Harlan, or build execution.
The Harlan digest must remain preview_only with sendsMessageNow false.
Fail proof if the summary claims card creation, approval writes, sprint opening, external send, or build authorization.
